reviews.review_title: Showing what the pen can do
reviews.review_description: The pen is a joy to sketch with in this app but as of 4th Oct 2025 I cannot get it to work at all in Gravity sketch. It used to work in the Quest 3 headset but not VR Link, but now it works in neither. The only reason I bought a quest 3 was to use the mx ink in gravity sketch. Please develop this MX Ink app more as  your pen is excellent!

reviews.review_title: Making an MX ink app? Try this.
reviews.review_description:
And so, after numerous app developers mostly failed to support their pen properly, Logitech had no choice but to demonstrate how even the most basic support for their stylus is supposed to work.

I'm going to shout at those developers now.

Come on gravity sketch! Where's the pressure sensitivity?

And paint XR: why are the brushes pointed in a different direction than the pen? Totally distracting, literally eliminates the point of the pen.

Vermillion works okay, but doesn't take advantage of most of the pens features.

ShapesXR does it right. But it's a subscription!

And META: why the heck didn't you add the pen as a controller option in the store? What incentives do developers even have to support it if pen owners can't find my app?
